mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, real_name, id_card, credit_score, user_level, status, role, last_login_time, last_login_ip, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `user` WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM `user` WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, status, role, credit_score, user_level) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{role}, #{creditScore}, #{userLevel})
mapper.update:
UPDATE `user`
nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, real_name = #{realName}, id_card = #{idCard}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET credit_score = #{creditScore}, user_level = #{userLevel} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET credit_score = #{creditScore} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE deleted = 0 AND role = 0
